title: Miku Totem
description: The legendary Hatsune Miku Totem to save you from dying.
body:
## NOTE: If you're playing version 1.21.x and this pack is labeled incompatible, don't worry it still runs fine.


# Hatsune Miku to the rescue!

Replace the original Totem model with your favorite idol.  
There will be a bugged part at the back of the 3D version because for some reason i can't model it to the slim version.

# FAQ  
### 1. Will it works with older versions?  
This 3D version will be a hit or miss. Just try...?  
### 2. < Mod/Resource Pack name > compatible?
**Yes.**  
If they don't modify the Totem's codes or file path then yes.
### 3. Bedrock when?
~~**When I learned how to make one for Bugrock.**~~\
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3f243daea00d127c2ffbc126cfbe149e90e0818.png)
### 4. Why does the version number sometimes goes down?
Backward compatibility.
